Bug / Task Description: Resolve two issues in the Bloom filter package (pkg/bloom). First, a correctness bug: under some sequences of additions and removals, CountingFilter can report a previously-added, not-fully-removed element as absent. A Bloom filter must never produce such a false negative. Make membership queries reliable across arbitrary add/remove sequences (including elements added many times and heavy interleaved churn from other elements), while keeping removal behavior correct for elements that are not affected by the bug. Second, a performance issue: Filter.FillRatio recomputes its result by scanning the entire bit array on every call. Make it run in constant time while returning exactly the same value for every filter state, including after unions and resets. Preserve all exported names, signatures, serialization formats, and externally observable behavior; confine changes to pkg/bloom.
Commit Subject: fix(bloom): correctness and performance fixes in the filter package
